title: MatGel: A MATLAB program for quantitative analysis of 2D polyacrylamide electrophoresis (2D-PAGE) protein gel images
author: Tiwari, Williams, et al.

steps.title: Preparation of protein gel images
steps.instruction: 2D-PAGE protein gel images can be taken by using any digital gel imaging systems that match with the protein gel staining dyes. Images can be saved in an image file format such as tiff, jpeg, bmp, or jpg.
